title: アオハル杯2戦目にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the second round of the Unity Cup preseason!
When I step into the waiting room...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hup! Lemon peel, orange wheel, upside-down
purple seal... Lemon peel, orange wheel,
upside-down purple seal...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Words of certain victory, I summon thee!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Where there's a will, there's a way? Of course!
Our team will certainly find our way to victory
together!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today's bound to be perfect! I can just feel it!
Let's do this like we mean it, Trainer!
